sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: What Are The Benefits Of Flying Delta Air Lines' Premium Select?
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines' Premium Select offers a premium economy experience with wider seats, increased legroom, an elevated dining experience, and enhanced amenities. This service, positioned between Main Cabin and Delta One, focuses on long-haul comfort and includes SkyPriority services. Premium Select is available on many long-haul international routes and select transcontinental and Hawaiian domestic flights, with plans for inclusion on future fleet additions like the Airbus A350-1000s and Boeing 787-10 Dreamliners.

feed.title: Alphabet Lost 10% in a Single Week Over Artificial Intelligence (AI) Spending Fears. Is This a Buying Opportunity or a Sign of Something Worse?
feed.summary: Alphabet's stock recently dropped 10% due to concerns over its aggressive AI infrastructure spending, which could impact free cash flow. Despite projections of negative cash flow and slower earnings growth, the author believes this presents a buying opportunity. Alphabet possesses significant advantages with its dominant market share in search and browser, substantial advertising revenue, and strong cash reserves to fund its AI investments.

feed.title: First Majestic Silver Corp stock (CA32076V1031): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is fundamentally changing how investors access news and insights on First Majestic Silver Corp (CA32076V1031), delivering personalized content proactively to mobile feeds. feed.summary: CVS Pharmacy is navigating retail challenges by leveraging its strong pharmacy benefits management segment and expanding health services. The company focuses on a hybrid model that combines traditional retail with comprehensive health services, digital tools, and cost-saving generic drug options. This strategy aims to ensure resilience against e-commerce competition and evolving consumer health trends, with an eye on future growth through vertical integration and specialized care offerings.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines Just Beat A Passenger Lawsuit Over 737 MAX Crashes — None Of The Plaintiffs Had Even Flown The Plane
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines successfully defended itself against a class-action lawsuit concerning the Boeing 737 MAX crashes. The lawsuit, brought by passengers who purchased tickets between August 2017 and March 2019, claimed breach of contract and fraud, arguing that Southwest sold tickets for an "unsafe" aircraft. The Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals upheld the district court's decision, finding that the plaintiffs lacked standing as none of them had flown on a 737 MAX, nor had they suffered physical or emotional injury, and all received the transportation they purchased.

feed.title: Dow Inc. stock (US2605571031): Is its packaging and specialty push strong enough to unlock new upsid
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (US2605571031) is strategically leveraging its leadership in advanced materials for packaging and infrastructure, positioning itself as a defensive investment amid cyclical pressures. The company's focus on high-value packaging and specialty chemicals aims to drive resilient growth by catering to essential sectors like food packaging and hygiene products, which are less susceptible to economic fluctuations. Dow's diversified model, emphasis on cost discipline, and investments in sustainable materials and technologies are expected to generate stable free cash flow and appeal to investors seeking inflation protection and income.
